mapper.insert: INSERT INTO code_repository (name, root_path, language, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{rootPath}, #{language}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, root_path, language, status, created_at, updated_at FROM code_repository WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
SELECT id, name, root_path, language, status, created_at, updated_at FROM code_repository WHERE name = #{name} AND root_path = #{rootPath} ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM code_repository WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, root_path, language, status, created_at, updated_at FROM code_repository ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE code_repository
name = #{name}, root_path = #{rootPath}, language = #{language}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = CAST(#{id} AS uuid)
